summary: Testing iteration 3: Bug fix verification for La Liga/Ligue 1 data swap + flag emojis feature. Backend: 11/11 tests passed (100%). Frontend: All features working correctly. CRITICAL BUG FIXED: La Liga now shows Barcelona at top (NOT PSG), Ligue 1 shows PSG (NOT Barcelona). Flag emojis visible for all 5 leagues. Fixed LEAGUE_ICONS undefined variable bug in frontend code.

issues: useNativeDriver warning in web preview console (expected behavior, not an issue in native app)
Shadow style props deprecation warnings (cosmetic only, not breaking)

bundesliga_tour_id_98.standings: ✅ Returns German teams: Bayern Munich (1st), Borussia Dortmund, Stuttgart, Leipzig, Leverkusen

tab_navigation.standings_tab: ✅ Working, displays standings table with correct teams

frontend_test_results.error_handling: ✅ No error messages found on page

critical_code_review_comments: ✅ Backend: tour_ids corrected - La Liga: 101 (was 95), Serie A: 100 (was 94), Bundesliga: 98 (was 92), Ligue 1: 95 (correct)
✅ Backend: All leagues now return correct data from YallaKora scraping
✅ Frontend: LEAGUE_FLAGS constant properly defined with country flag emojis
✅ Frontend: Fixed LEAGUE_ICONS undefined variable bug (line 413) - changed to LEAGUE_FLAGS
✅ Frontend: Flag emojis displaying correctly in top menu for all 5 leagues
✅ Frontend: All testID attributes present for testing
✅ Integration: Backend and frontend communication working flawlessly
✅ Bug Fix Verified: La Liga shows Barcelona (NOT PSG), Ligue 1 shows PSG (NOT Barcelona)
seed_data_creation: No seed data needed - app uses real-time web scraping from YallaKora
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix verified and working. La Liga (tour_id 101) now returns Spanish teams (Barcelona, Real Madrid) instead of French teams. Ligue 1 (tour_id 95) returns French teams (PSG, Lens). All 5 leagues return correct data. Flag emojis feature working - all league buttons show country flags in top menu. Fixed LEAGUE_ICONS undefined variable bug in frontend. App is production-ready.
rca_of_issue: Root Cause: Wrong tour_ids in backend LEAGUES configuration caused La Liga to fetch French league data (tour_id 95 instead of 101), Serie A to fetch wrong data (94 instead of 100), and Bundesliga to fetch wrong data (92 instead of 98). Frontend had LEAGUE_ICONS undefined variable (should be LEAGUE_FLAGS). Fix Applied: Updated tour_ids in backend/server.py lines 52, 61, 70 and fixed frontend/app/index.tsx line 413. Verification: Backend tests confirm correct teams returned for each league. Frontend tests confirm Barcelona at top of La Liga (NOT PSG) and flags visible.
